meta.title: Portfolio — Sebastian Cachis
meta.description: Full Stack Jr. specialized in DDD/CQRS architecture and fintech. Leading CorilOne in production with Java 17, Spring Boot 3, and Next.js 16.

hero.name: Sebastian Cachis
hero.tagline: I build financial platforms with architecture ready to scale.
hero.metric: Leading CorilOne in production · Top 10% at UPC · 4 years in fintech

about.heading: From Java support to leading portfolio management platforms end-to-end.
body: I'm a Junior Full Stack Developer specialized in DDD/CQRS architecture, microservices, and event-driven systems, with four years of experience in financial services — Grupo Coril, Alfin Banco, and ecomserv. I currently lead CorilOne, Coril Asset Management and Altum MFO's end-to-end platform, from domain design through to production.

I combine Java 17/Spring Boot 3 on the backend with Next.js 16 on the frontend to build platforms that must be reliable, traceable, and auditable. I'm especially interested in the balance between long-term technical decisions and continuous delivery that moves the business.
I'm pursuing a Software Engineering degree at UPC, ranked in the top 10%. C1 English. Based in Lima, Peru.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.intro: Four years in financial services — from Java 8 API optimization to leading DDD/CQRS architectures in production.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.intro: A selection of recent fintech work. Some cases are under NDA and are presented at a narrative level.

stack.intro: The tools I use to build reliable, traceable platforms ready to scale.
